mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY AS company, REQUEST_ID AS requestId, EMP_CODE AS empCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), WORK_DATE, 23) AS workDate, REQUEST_CATEGORY AS requestCategory, REQUEST_WORK_CODE AS requestWorkCode, REASON AS reason, START_TIME AS startTime, END_TIME AS endTime, STATUS AS status, REQUESTER_CODE AS requesterCode FROM HRTATTREQ01 WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTREQ01 ( COMPANY, EMP_CODE, WORK_DATE, REQUEST_CATEGORY, REQUEST_WORK_CODE, REASON, START_TIME, END_TIME, STATUS, REQUESTER_CODE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{empCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), #{requestCategory}, #{requestWorkCode}, #{reason}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{requesterCode}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTREQ01 SET REQUEST_WORK_CODE = #{requestWorkCode}, REASON = #{reason}, START_TIME = #{startTime}, END_TIME = #{endTime}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
UPDATE HRTATTREQ01 SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_CODE
SELECT SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName, WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, SHIFT_CODE
